groundwater_proxy.interpretation_note: Nearby groundwater stations can indicate regional groundwater behaviour but are not an in-situ peat water-table sensor for Wiesmoor-Nord.
groundwater_proxy.label: groundwater proxy

source.name: NLWKN groundwater monitoring data
source.note: Add a deterministic station selection and latest-value adapter before emitting station values.

stations.station_name: NLWKN nearby groundwater station (to be resolved)

peat_context.context_note: Wiesmoor is a settlement and landscape shaped by raised-bog peat extraction, drainage, peat-fired industry and subsequent agricultural/horticultural use. MoorIS Niedersachsen maps the Wiesmoor-Nord peatland context, including peat-thickness information; this observer carries that context as static source metadata rather than as a live sensor.

peat_thickness_context.description: MoorIS Niedersachsen / Wiesmoor-Nord provides local peat-thickness context for the mapped peatland area.
peat_thickness_context.precision_note: No numeric peat-thickness value is emitted until a reproducible MoorIS data extraction is added.

limitations: Regional proxy observation — not an in-situ peat water-table sensor.
DWD daily rainfall is one regional proxy component only and is not an in-situ peat water-table measurement.
Groundwater stations, satellite soil-water data and weather totals may describe different depths, footprints and response times.

regional_soil_water.dataset: Copernicus Soil Water Index Europe 1 km v2
regional_soil_water.label: regional satellite-derived soil-water condition

source.name: Copernicus Soil Water Index Europe 1 km v2

sources.name: NLWKN groundwater monitoring data

sources.dataset: Recent daily climate observations Germany (KL), daily precipitation RSK and daily mean temperature TMK
sources.name: Deutscher Wetterdienst (DWD) Climate Data Center

summary: Wiesmoor peatland hydrological pressure remains unavailable as an in-situ conclusion; DWD daily rainfall is emitted when available as a regional weather proxy component only.

coverage.minimum_coverage_rule: 7-day total requires 7/7 valid precipitation days; 30-day total requires at least 27/30 valid precipitation days. DWD -999/missing and absent dates are unavailable, not zero.

weather_pressure.label: weather pressure

source.dataset: Recent daily climate observations Germany (KL), daily precipitation RSK and daily mean temperature TMK
source.name: Deutscher Wetterdienst (DWD) Climate Data Center

station.selection_method: Nearest DWD CDC recent daily climate station to Wiesmoor (53.4167, 7.7333) with station metadata end date within 14 days; distance uses haversine great-circle calculation.

weather_pressure.temperature_label: latest valid daily mean temperature (TMK), not an instantaneous/current temperature
